title: 현금성 GitHub bounty scout 7건 — GO 없음
channel: GitHub issue + fork PR + bounty/platform payout

evidence.summary: NO-GO / DUPLICATE — Issue open, assignee 없음, PR route exists. Comments already contain many /attempt and PR references (#50/#51/#52 etc.); open PR list has 20 PRs with several exact currency-formatting fixes. / GitHub issue has /bounty $50 and $50 label; direct platform/bounty route appears visible but claim mechanics not fully documented in body.

NO-GO / DUPLICATE — Issue open, assignee 없음, forks/PR route exists. Open PR list shows competing “Add verified changelog generator” and multiple bounty PRs; acceptance requires tested sample output on a real repo and README. / Issue body says $50 powered by Opire, /opire try, payment released automatically on merge.

NO-GO / DUPLICATE — Issue open, assignee 없음. Existing open PR titled “[BOUNTY 5] TEMPLATE: CLAUDE.md for a Next.js + SQL…” targets the same acceptance area. Output is subjective/template quality, not deterministic micro-fix. / Issue body says $75 powered by Opire, /opire try, payment released automatically on merge.

NO-GO / DUPLICATE — Issue open, assignee 없음. Open PRs include “Add extended promotional component filter”, “feat: add extended promotional component column”, and “Add is_extended_promotional column to components” already addressing the same request. / Issue has /bounty $75 and $75 label; likely platform bounty.

HOLD / OPPORTUNITY_COST — Issue open, assignee 없음. Comments already include /opire try and multiple claims. Acceptance includes localStorage persistence, storage-event cross-tab sync, reset option, fallback validation, exact PR title. Repo has parallel active PRs and prior submitted PR in same org was closed as incomplete. / Labels include $40, 💎 Bounty, AI Agent friendly; comments include /opire try. Cash/platform possible.

NO-GO / OPPORTUNITY_COST — Issue open, assignee 없음. Multiple attempts/claims. Acceptance requires Effect Schema validation, startup exit table, --validate-config CLI flag, docs/output behavior; easy to under-implement. / Labels include $35, 💎 Bounty, AI Agent friendly; comments include /opire try and payment route mentions.

NO-GO / HIGH_USER_INPUT — Issue open, assignee 없음, but bot comments warn “You must be a core team member, or an administrator to start this task.” Existing PR #1008/#1009 comments and open PR “fix: Skip storage layout check…” already target it. / Labels show Price: 300 USD and Ubiquity task metadata.

decision_history.summary: cash/platform bounty/direct-payout 후보 7건 검색 및 preflight 확인.
다수 후보가 이미 exact competing PR/attempt로 선점되어 자동 PR 제외.
중복 제출, 참여자격 제한, broad acceptance, 불완전 PR 위험이 실행 차단.

next_action: 다음 bounty scout에서 경쟁 PR 0건, participant eligibility clear, deterministic small diff/test, cash/platform payout visible 후보를 우선 재검색.
